title: AIR Preferences
description: Tool-managed user preferences file (~/.air/preferences.json). Kept separate from air.json so machine-written state never collides with the user's hand-edited composition config.

autoDiscovery.description: State for the auto-discovery prompt shown by `air start` and `air prepare`.

dismissed.description: Discovered (repoRoot, indexPath) pairs the user has asked AIR not to offer again. Granularity is per-path so a new index file added later is still surfaced.

repoRoot.description: Absolute path to the git repository root (or the target directory if not a git repo) at the time the prompt was dismissed.

indexPath.description: Path relative to repoRoot for the specific index file the user dismissed. For catalogs, this is the catalog directory path.
